jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Thyrocare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Thyrocare in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Thyrocare:
Thyrocare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thyrocare!
